allow: Bash(python -c "import sys; [print\(l, end=''''\) for l in sys.stdin if ''Ionicons'' not in l]")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys; [print\(l.rstrip\(\)\) for l in sys.stdin if ''vector-icons'' not in l]")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys; lines=[l.rstrip\(\) for l in sys.stdin]; errors=[l for l in lines if ''error'' in l.lower\(\) and ''warning'' not in l.lower\(\)]; print\(''\\n''.join\(errors\) if errors else ''No errors''\)")
